home.title: Drag Race Pokédex
home.subtitle: Because you know the queen… but you can't remember which season she was on...

filters.label: Filters
filters.franchiseTreeHint: Select one or more franchises and seasons

intro.headline: Welcome to the Drag Race Quiz!
intro.lead: Think you know your queens? Time to prove it. 💅
intro.description: Each game consists of 10 randomly generated questions about contestants from the Drag Race universe.

questionsList.whoIsThisQueen: Who is this queen? (identify a contestant from their photo)
questionsList.whichFranchise: Which franchise is this queen from?
questionsList.whoWonSeason: Who won season 3 of the USA franchise?

intro.everyGameDifferent: Every game is different, so no two runs are exactly the same.

scoring.title: 🧠 Scoring
scoring.totalPoints: Each quiz is worth 100 points total.
scoring.confidenceIntro: Before answering a question, you choose how confident you feel by selecting a difficulty mode. The harder the mode, the more points you can win.

duo.label: ✌️ Duo Mode — 2 points
duo.description: You get 2 possible answers. One is correct, one is wrong. It’s a 50/50 guess — the safest way to secure a few points.

square.label: 💅 Mode — 5 points
square.description: You get 4 possible answers. Only one is correct, the other three are wrong. A classic multiple-choice question — safe, but not the biggest score.

cash.label: 👑 Cash Mode — 10 points
cash.description: No options. No safety net. You must type the answer yourself. To help you, the input field includes auto-completion suggestions while you type. High risk, high reward.

howToWin.title: 👑 How to Win

steps.scorePoints: Score as many points as possible out of 100

howToWin.goodLuck: Good luck… and don’t f*ck it up. 💄

feedback.pointsWon: You won {{points}} points on this question.
